description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the python:3.8-slim Docker image and caches pip packages in ~/.cache/pip/. Include a before_script that runs pip install poetry and then poetry install --no-interaction --no-ansi. Set the variable POETRY_VIRTUALENVS_CREATE to 'false'. Add a job named test in the default test stage that executes ./manage.py test. The pipeline has no branch or tag restrictions, so it runs on all commits.
